value: I build reliable websites, e-commerce systems, admin dashboards, GIS mapping workflows, and agritech platforms for teams that need practical software backed by strong IT operations experience.

I am currently Head of IT Operations and Software Developer at Rainbow Ruiru Resort, and I am also the founder of Kilimo Kisasa AI and CasualContracts. Kilimo Kisasa AI is an AI platform for crop disease diagnosis and sourcing farm inputs, while CasualContracts is a job portal that helps employers source casual workers.
